name: d3-celestial
when_to_use: 需要可缩放旋转的全天星图、星座线、银河、深空天体或指定时地的天空投影时用它而非手写 canvas,因为原生在球面投影、星表、坐标变换和天体历算上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画装饰性星点,做不到赤道/黄道/银道坐标变换、几十种球面投影、真实星等/星表、星座边界和行星位置;d3-celestial 把天文数据与 canvas 投影一起交付。

data_in.note: config 原样进入 Celestial.display,但 container/datapath/width 与会创建全局表单的开关由 boot 保守覆盖。恒星、星座、银河和行星数据由 pinned datapath 读取,不是让 AI 现编星表。

config.projectionRatio?: positive number | null —— 默认 null,按 projection 推断
config.lang?: supported language code string —— 默认空字符串,显示 IAU/代号

stars?._default: 上游默认显示至 6 等星并按光谱着色
stars?.names?: boolean —— 映射到 stars.designation(Bayer/Flamsteed 标签,默认 true);专有名用 stars.propername(默认 false)

dsos?._default: 上游默认显示亮深空天体

constellations?._default: 上游默认显示名称和连线、不显示边界

config.lines?: Celestial 原生 graticule/equatorial/ecliptic/galactic 配置对象 —— 默认上游样式
config.background?: {fill?:CSS color string,opacity?:number 0..1,stroke?:CSS color string,width?:number} —— 默认黑色
config.horizon?: Celestial 原生 horizon 配置对象 —— 默认不显示

spec.note: Celestial 由 projectionRatio 从显式像素宽推导 canvas 高;boot 用默认 420px 反推最大宽 840px并给容器明确像素高。最终高可能因投影比例略有不同,不得使用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

boot.widget: unsupported: d3-celestial@0.7.35 依赖 document.getElementById、文档级 id、window resize 和 body 辅助节点,且 CSS/选择器不具 shadow 隔离能力;违反铁律 2。

example._why: 投影、坐标系和多层天文数据配置深嵌套,minimal example 固定一条真实全天星图路径,避免 AI 编造星表或错放图层字段。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:需要跨源读取 pinned data/*.json,并在 iframe document.head 加 CSS
carriers.widget: unsupported:文档级 id/body/window 与 shadowRoot 不兼容
carriers.codex: conditional:需允许 jsDelivr ESM、CSS 和 pinned data/*.json 跨源读取;canvas 与交互本身无 worker/wasm 依赖

isolation.evidence: celestial.js: library appends a hidden <div id='d3-celestial-svg'> to body (L4565 d3.select('body').append('div')) and resolves it via document-level id selectors; window resize listener via d3.select(window).on('resize',resize) (L99); boot additionally injects celestial.css <link> into document.head for artifact/codex. Document-level ids + body node + window resize are all incompatible with shadow encapsulation — corroborates the entry's widget=unsupported verdict.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a zoomable, rotatable all-sky map, constellation lines, the Milky Way, deep-sky objects, or a sky projection for a specified time and place, instead of hand-writing canvas, because native implementations fail at spherical projection, star catalogs, coordinate transforms, and astronomical calculations.
en.why_valuable: AI can only draw decorative stars by default; it cannot provide equatorial/ecliptic/galactic coordinate conversion, dozens of spherical projections, real magnitudes and star catalogs, constellation boundaries, or planet positions. d3-celestial delivers astronomical data together with canvas projection.

data_in.note: config passes through to Celestial.display, but boot conservatively overrides container/datapath/width and switches that would create global forms. Star, constellation, Milky Way, and planet data is read from the pinned datapath rather than invented by AI.

config.projectionRatio?: positive number | null -- Default null; inferred from projection
config.lang?: supported language code string -- Default empty string, showing IAU/designations

stars?._default: Upstream defaults show stars down to magnitude 6, colored by spectrum
stars?.names?: boolean -- Maps to stars.designation (Bayer/Flamsteed labels, default true); proper names use stars.propername (default false)

dsos?._default: Upstream defaults show bright deep-sky objects

constellations?._default: Upstream defaults show names and lines, but not boundaries

planets?.which?: ('sol'|'mer'|'ven'|'ter'|'lun'|'mar'|'jup'|'sat'|'ura'|'nep')[] -- Upstream defaults to all ten bodies

config.lines?: Celestial native graticule/equatorial/ecliptic/galactic configuration object -- Default upstream styles
config.background?: {fill?:CSS color string,opacity?:number 0..1,stroke?:CSS color string,width?:number} -- Default black
config.horizon?: Celestial native horizon configuration object -- Hidden by default

spec.note: Celestial derives canvas height from explicit pixel width through projectionRatio. boot uses the default 420px height to derive a maximum width of 840px and gives the container an explicit pixel height. Final height may vary slightly with projection ratio; vh/percentage height must not be used (Rule 3).
